body:
🪄 Prologue
The world of Modland has never been simple. But now the very fabric of reality has thinned, opening pathways for ancient energies. Magic oozes from cracks in stone, spirits awaken in forgotten forests, and pages of lost grimoires whisper in the depths of caves.

Arcanum Concordia is a call to those who sense the call of the wondrous. This is a story you will write together with your friends. Become an archmage studying dusty tomes, a druid forging an alliance with an ancient forest, or a dark alchemist using forbidden rituals. Here, everyone will find their own path to power, but the greatest secrets will be revealed only to those who can combine their powers.

✨ Schools of Magic (Choose Your Path)
This collection is built around four great magical traditions that complement rather than contradict each other:

Ars Nouveau (New Art): Elegant and intuitive magic of spells and automation. Craft unique spells, tame charming magical force-fellows, and build ritual chambers where energy itself will work wonders. A path for aesthetes and inventors.

EvilCraft (Evil Craft): Magic emerged from the shadows. Work with blood, corruption, and dark gems. Create fearsome weapons, command the undead, and erect gloomy towers. A path for those who are not afraid to pay the price for power.

Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks (Books of Conspiracies): Classic combat magic in the spirit of RPGs. Explore dungeons in search of ancient grimoires, learn and combine powerful spells—from a lightning shield to an icy prison. A path for adventurers and battle masters.

Roots Classic: Ancient, shamanic root magic. Connect with the spirits of nature, perform complex rituals under the stars, and create living staves that channel the power of the earth. A path for contemplators and guardians of balance.

🌍 A world full of wonders and dangers
Magic has changed not only you, but the entire world around you.

Explore the grand dungeons of When Dungeons Arise! and YUNG's Better Caves, filled with traps and treasures.

Venture into the magical yet dangerous Twilight Forest—an entire dimension with progression, puzzles, and epic boss battles.

Meet dozens of new creatures from Alex's Mobs: from cute cabbage snails to fearsome orcacoders. Some can be tamed, while others can yield rare alchemical components.

Decorate your tower with hundreds of parts from Supplementaries and establish a network of Waystones for instant travel around the world.

⚙️ Technology? No, High Art!
Even the creation of complex mechanisms is subject to magic here. The Create mod in this build is not just engineering, but kinetic sorcery. With it, you can build a truly moving artifact: a rotating observatory, an automatic ritual platform, or a secret portal that opens according to a complex algorithm. This is the magic of logic and movement.

🤝 Play Together
Arcanum Concordia is designed for co-op.

Combine forces: a druid's ritual can enhance a mage's spells, and one player's dark artifact can be the key to solving another's mystery.

Specialize or become a generalist. Share resources and knowledge.

Challenge powerful bosses and conquer dungeons shoulder to shoulder.

Build a shared Mage Citadel—the greatest monument to your alliance.

🔧 Installation and Requirements
Minimum Requirements:

Game RAM: 6 GB (8 GB recommended).

Server RAM: 4 GB (for 2-4 players, 6 GB recommended).

Forge: Version 47.2.0 or later for 1.20.1.

Recommended client mods (included in the build):

Embeddium/Canary — for high performance and shader support.

JourneyMap — for cooperative navigation.

JEI (Just Enough Items) is an indispensable encyclopedia of all recipes.

Almost Unified removes duplicate resources.

Wise Mage's Advice: Don't try to master all the schools at once. Choose one and become a master of it.
